name: Horn of Valhalla
description: You can take a Magic action to blow this horn. In response, warrior spirits from the plane of Ysgard appear in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet of you. Each spirit uses the Berserker stat block and returns to Ysgard after 1 hour or when it drops to 0 Hit Points.

summoning.duration: 1 hour or when drops to 0 HP

properties.reuse_duration: Can't be used again until 7 days have passed

requirement_effect.met: Summoned spirits are Friendly and follow your commands
